rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed inside annex agree blocks scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output feature bindings in component implementation annexes
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must reference only identifiers visible in the current component scope
Component type annexes should contain input assumptions and output guarantees with concrete bounds or visible relations
AGREE syntax follows: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; eq name : type = expression; const name : type = value; assign output = expression;
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are delimited by annex agree {** ... **};
Assign statements are only valid in implementation scope for output features or auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and component merging patterns
